/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/robot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/obstacles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/vec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AgrisSim.dir/src/logger.cpp.o -o AgrisSim  -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
